title: submitting the CV
description: Applicants submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.

title: viewing and editing the CV
description: Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.

title: answering screening questions
description: Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.

title: getting a rating for the submitted CV
description: The system generates a percentage-based result, providing a fair evaluation of each applicant.
